# THIS FILE LISTS ALL IGNORED PATTERNS AND THEIR PURPOSE

# PATTERN: node_modules/
# PLACEHOLDER: (Auto-generated folder containing project dependencies)
# EXAMPLE: /node_modules, /backend/node_modules, /frontend/node_modules

# PATTERN: dist/
# PLACEHOLDER: (Build output folder)
# EXAMPLE: /frontend/dist

# PATTERN: .env
# PLACEHOLDER: (Secret environment variables)
# EXAMPLE: 
# DATABASE_URL=postgresql://...
# JWT_SECRET=...

# PATTERN: .vscode/ or .idea/
# PLACEHOLDER: (Personal IDE configurations)
# EXAMPLE: /.vscode/settings.json

# PATTERN: *.log
# PLACEHOLDER: (Error and debug logs)
# EXAMPLE: error.log, npm-debug.log

# PATTERN: .DS_Store
# PLACEHOLDER: (macOS specific folder metadata)
# EXAMPLE: .DS_Store

# PATTERN: coverage/
# PLACEHOLDER: (Test coverage reports)
# EXAMPLE: /coverage/index.html
